title: Incorrect query result when redundant terms appears in WHERE clause
poc:
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON x=y
 WHERE x='good' AND y='good';
key_bug_features: Redundant terms in WHERE clause causing incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x TEXT NOT NULL, y INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE t2(y TEXT UNIQUE, z REAL);
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON x=y WHERE x='good' AND y='good' AND y IS NOT NULL;
